title: perityle californica var. nuda
intro: Perityle californica var. nuda is a rare and lesser-known variety of the California bee plant, a type of flowering shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Perityle californica var. nuda are said to include pain relief, wound healing, and the treatment of various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
